name: gauge
title: Gauge Dial
description: A 180° semicircular progress gauge widget. A muted track arc, a coloured value arc whose sweep maps a 0–100 value, and centred text — a large mono value with a small muted caption. The arc colour is token-driven via --oo-gauge-fill: teal by default, an explicit severity token, or an 'auto' threshold mode (green / orange / red as the value rises). Rendered by OOW.gauge from a declarative [data-widget="gauge"] mount; deterministic from data-seed. Refined with a draw-in animation, hover glow, keyboard focus ring, loading and disabled treatments.
